privileged_info_summary: The task uses the CT Cranium DICOM dataset (case ID '0051') from the official InVesalius v3.0 release available at github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip. This is real medical imaging data (not synthetic) from the InVesalius project. The task requires exporting two PNG images: Coronal view to /home/ga/Documents/coronal_thick_slab.png and Sagittal view to /home/ga/Documents/sagittal_thick_slab.png, with a minimum thickness of 40.0 mm to simulate X-ray 'thick slab' projections. Files must exceed 20000 bytes to pass verification.
